"'''In His Image'''" is a short story written by [[Karen Traviss]] for ''[[Vader: The Ultimate Guide]]''. It takes place in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] and details the creation of [[Cuis clone|Force-sensitive stormtroopers]]. This story and its sequel, ''[[A Two-Edged Sword]]'', were both included in the paperback version of ''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''.

==Plot summary==
One month after the formation of the first [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] begin looking for new troopers, troopers that would obey them. Vader inspects a trooper, who is unfamiliar with the features of his new helmet. After Vader dismisses the trooper, Vader asks his master, who was watching from behind the scenes, what he thinks.

Palpatine believes that they still need more obedient troopers, and asks Vader and [[Sa Cuis]] (an [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]]) to go to the [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. When Vader leaves the room, Palpatine asks Sa Cuis to assassinate Darth Vader.

Later, Vader asks Sa Cuis and [[Erv Lekauf]] (Vader's helper) to give the cloners some of their [[DNA/Legends|DNA]]. Soon, Vader realizes that someone has set him up, so that Sa Cuis could kill him. Vader and Sa engage in combat, and Vader asks who he is working for. Cuis says that he will never tell, and Vader kills him.

Vader returns to Palpatine, and his master tells him that he passed the test. Palpatine tells Vader that they will talk after he has a meeting with the [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]]. Vader then realizes that he is no longer a man or [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], but the first Jedi rule is still with him—survive.
